title: agrostis alba subsp. sylvatica
intro: Agrostis alba subsp. sylvatica, also known as Mountain Bent or Bent Grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Agrostis alba subsp. sylvatica can be prepared into various herbal products such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
